data.title: AB “Ignitis grupė” to select six new Supervisory Board members by July 24, 2025, as current term ends on October 25, 2025.
data.description: AB “Ignitis grupė” has reported that on July 4, 2025, the Ministry of Finance of the Republic of Lithuania, representing the majority shareholder, disclosed the appointment of six independent members to the Group’s Supervisory Board. The current Board's term concludes on October 25, 2025. Interested candidates have the opportunity to submit their applications by July 24, 2025.

data.title: MemeCore's $M token listed on major exchanges, trading since July 3, 2025, with celebratory campaigns.
data.description: On July 3, 2025, trading officially began for MemeCore's native token, $M, on various platforms. The company, known as the world's first Layer 1 blockchain tailored for the Meme 2.0 era, will be launching celebratory campaigns across different platforms.

data.title: Sodium Perborate Market to reach $184.0 million by 2030, with a CAGR of 3.7%. Demand rising across industries like healthcare, detergents, textiles. Market shift towards sustainable alternatives. Key players: Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc., Merck KGaA, Evonik Treibacher GmbH. Drivers: Growing demand for detergents. Restraints: Stringent regulations. Opportunities: Advanced water treatment. Challenges: Environmental concerns. Europe held second-largest market share.
data.description: The Sodium Perborate Market is expected to increase from USD 153.3 million in 2025 to USD 184.0 million in 2030, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 3.7%. Sodium perborate is in demand across various industries like healthcare, detergents, and textiles due to its bleaching and disinfectant properties. The industry is shifting towards environmentally friendly and efficient formulations, influencing the market landscape. Key players in the market include Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc., Merck KGaA, and Evonik Treibacher GmbH. The main drivers are the growing demand for detergents and cleaning products, while challenges include environmental concerns. The study found that the sodium perborate tetrahydrate segment accounted for the largest market share in 2024, with the household & industrial cleaning segment being the largest. Europe held the second-largest share in the market.

data.title: Stock market hits new highs, Dow Jones Futures fall; Tesla down post robotaxi launch, Uber breaks out. 5 stocks in buy zones.
data.description: The stock market surged to record highs just before the Fourth of July holiday. Tesla witnessed a decrease following the robotaxi launch, whereas Uber experienced a breakthrough. Dow Jones Futures declined subsequent to the market peaking, with Uber emerging as the leader among five stocks entering buy zones.

data.title: Atradius makes Management Board changes effective Sept 1, 2025. Responsibilities and composition revised in Amsterdam.
data.description: Atradius has recently disclosed alterations in the distribution of responsibilities and Management Board composition, set to take place on September 1st. This update was unveiled in Amsterdam on July 4, 2025. The company has reassigned duties and reshaped the Management Board, signifying a shift in their operational structure.

data.title: New trading platform Pivex offers users up to $200,000 in simulated capital for trading without personal funds in Dubai, UAE.
data.description: A new proprietary trading platform called Pivex has recently launched in Dubai, UAE. This platform offers users the opportunity to access up to $200,000 in simulated trading capital, allowing them to engage in trading activities without using their own funds. Pivex aims to streamline proprietary trading processes and make it more accessible to users.

data.title: BiyaPay marks 6th year of innovation in global multi-asset trading, focusing on user experience and technology advancement.
data.description: BiyaPay, a globally renowned multi-asset trading wallet, is celebrating its sixth anniversary after being founded in 2019. Throughout its six-year journey, BiyaPay has remained committed to a user-focused approach, consistently introducing technological advancements and enhancing products to improve the User Experience.

data.title: IDEX Biometrics implemented a 100-to-1 share consolidation on 4 July 2025, following resolution at an extraordinary general meeting on 11 April 2025.
data.description: On April 11, 2025, an extraordinary general meeting resolved a 100-to-1 share consolidation (reverse split) in IDEX Biometrics ASA as previously announced.
